items.headline: Iran Fires Drones at US Navy Vessels as Ceasefire Expires
items.body: Iran launched drone strikes against US military vessels enforcing the blockade and separately targeted equipment on Kuwaiti territory at Bubiyan Island injuring six civilians. The ceasefire formally expires tonight and Iran has withdrawn its negotiators leaving no diplomatic channel open as Trump warns strikes will follow.

items.headline: Hungary Elects New Government With Landslide Majority Ending Orbán Era
items.body: The Tisza party won a two-thirds parliamentary majority ousting Viktor Orbán after the highest voter turnout Hungary has seen since the fall of communism. A new government is expected to lift Hungary's veto on the European Union's ninety-billion-euro Ukraine support package removing Russia's last inside ally in the bloc.

items.headline: Japan Hit by Major Earthquake With Mega-Quake Risk Now Elevated
items.body: A magnitude 7.7 earthquake struck off northeastern Japan prompting tsunami warnings and evacuation orders for nearly 172,000 people across five prefectures. Japan's Meteorological Agency then issued an advisory warning that the chance of a follow-on mega-quake in the north had risen tenfold above normal.

items.headline: Chinese Robot Beats Human Half-Marathon World Record by Six Minutes
items.body: A bipedal humanoid robot called Lightning developed by Chinese firm Honor completed a 21-kilometre race in Beijing faster than any human has ever run the distance. The result signals that Chinese robotics development has crossed a threshold from competitive curiosity to benchmark-setting physical performance against humans.

meanwhile.text: Japanese researchers confirmed a room-temperature superconducting material held its properties under standard atmospheric pressure in peer-reviewed replication tests published April 2026.
A study published in Nature Medicine found that a single-dose gene therapy reversed inherited deafness in children with measurable hearing restoration at 12 months.
meanwhile.search: gene therapy inherited deafness children results 2026

meanwhile.text: A Gallup survey published April 2026 found a record share of Americans now describe themselves as politically independent rather than aligned with either major party.

es.headline: Spain's Regularisation Drive Hits 42,000 Online Applications in First Days
es.body: Over 42,000 undocumented migrants submitted online applications within days of Spain's extraordinary regularisation programme opening on 16 April 2026. The scale of immediate uptake signals the grey economy workforce is larger and more organised than official estimates suggested.

no.headline: Norway Hospitality Strike Expands as Mediation Collapses and Thousands More Workers Join
no.body: Over 1,900 hotel and restaurant workers walked out on April 19 after union and employer talks on the national hospitality agreement broke down. The strike is set to more than double by April 23 as it spreads to new cities during the spring tourism season.

uk.headline: UK Prime Minister Admits Mandelson Appointment Was Wrong in Parliament
uk.body: Prime Minister Starmer told parliament he should not have appointed Peter Mandelson as US ambassador after vetting failure details emerged. A sitting prime minister admitting a core diplomatic appointment was wrong under parliamentary pressure signals weakened executive authority at a fragile moment.

nl.headline: Netherlands Activates National Oil Crisis Plan for the First Time
nl.body: The Dutch cabinet triggered phase one of its national oil crisis plan as Hormuz disruptions tightened fuel supply chains. The move opens legal powers to ban fossil fuel exports to neighbouring countries and restrict production at high-consumption factories.
